name: Baked Potato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the water, bread flour, nonfat dried milk, sugar, salt, sour cream, instant potato flakes, bacon bits, chives, and yeast.
2. Mix until a very stiff dough forms. Be careful not to add any additional water, as the dough will be dry.
3. Form the dough into a 1-pound loaf and place it in a greased baking dish.
4. Cover and let the dough rise at room temperature for about 30 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Bake the bread for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
